title: Pure vegetarian flavors crafted with quality ingredients.
subtitle: From crispy dosas and fluffy idlis to rich North Indian thalis, refreshing juices, and indulgent desserts — over 100 items to choose from.

items.name: Cheese Masala Dosa
items.description: Crispy dosa filled with spiced potato masala and melted cheese, served with sambar and chutney.

items.name: Butter Masala Dosa
items.description: Butter-roasted dosa with potato masala filling — crispy on the outside, soft within.

items.name: Schezwan Masala Dosa
items.description: Dosa spread with spicy schezwan sauce and filled with masala — a fusion favorite.

items.name: Paneer Dosa
items.description: Crispy dosa generously stuffed with seasoned paneer crumble and spices.

items.name: Ghee Gun Powder Thatte Idly
items.description: Soft thatte idly drizzled with ghee and served with gun powder and sambar.

items.name: Open Butter Masala Dosa
items.description: Open-style dosa with butter and potato masala — a visual and flavorful treat.

items.name: Curd Rice
items.description: Cool and refreshing curd rice tempered with mustard seeds and curry leaves.

items.name: Veg Cheese Grill Sandwich
items.description: Grilled sandwich loaded with fresh vegetables and melted cheese.

items.name: Veg Grilled Sandwich
items.description: Classic grilled sandwich with fresh vegetable filling and butter-toasted bread.

items.name: Cream of Mushroom Soup
items.description: Velvety mushroom soup with a hint of cream and fresh herbs.

items.name: Hot & Sour Soup
items.description: Tangy and spicy Indo-Chinese soup with vegetables and tofu.

items.name: Sweet Corn Vegetable Soup
items.description: Thick and hearty sweet corn soup loaded with fresh vegetables.

items.name: Veg Schezwan Fried Rice
items.description: Wok-tossed rice with vegetables in a fiery schezwan sauce.

items.name: Veg Hakka Noodles
items.description: Stir-fried hakka noodles tossed with fresh vegetables and soy sauce.

items.name: Paneer Manchurian Gravy
items.description: Crispy paneer balls in a tangy Manchurian gravy with spring onions.

items.name: North Indian Mini Meals
items.description: A complete North Indian thali with roti, dal, sabzi, rice, salad, and sweet.

items.name: Roti Curry
items.description: Freshly made roti served with a choice of curry — simple and satisfying.

items.name: Butter Naan
items.description: Soft and fluffy naan bread brushed with butter, baked in tandoor.

items.name: Aloo Paratha
items.description: Stuffed paratha with spiced potato filling, served with curd and pickle.

items.name: Pani Puri
items.description: Crispy hollow puris filled with tangy spiced water, chutney, and potato.

items.name: Cheese Pav Bhaji
items.description: Mumbai-style spiced vegetable bhaji topped with cheese, served with butter pav.

items.name: Dahi Samosa Chat
items.description: Crushed samosas topped with yogurt, chutneys, and crispy sev.

items.name: Fresh Pomegranate Juice
items.description: Freshly extracted pomegranate juice — sweet, tangy, and refreshing.

items.name: Butter Scotch Milk Shake
items.description: Thick and creamy butterscotch milkshake topped with crushed nuts.

items.name: Gadbad Ice Cream
items.description: A signature Karnataka dessert — layered ice cream with fruits, nuts, and jelly.
